KEY MESSAGE
From data to decision systems.
From prediction to mechanism.
Explore the Platform→View Use Cases→
ZOOOO PLATFORM

A platform for operational decisions.

Zoooo Platform turns data into executable decision systems—models, simulations, and controls that operate at scale.

MODULE
Zoooo Core
Unified models. Shared ontology. Durable interfaces.
MODULE
Zoooo Simulation
Counterfactuals. Stress tests. Scenario control.
MODULE
Zoooo Intelligence
Signals to decisions. Human + machine control loops.
DIFFERENCE

Prediction is not a plan.

Typical AI
  • —Produces forecasts.
  • —Optimizes local metrics.
  • —Breaks under regime change.
Decision Intelligence
  • —Builds mechanisms.
  • —Optimizes system outcomes.
  • —Adapts under uncertainty.
SYSTEMS

Operate the systems that run the world.

Financial Systems
Risk, allocation, execution.
Biological Systems
Dynamics, constraints, intervention.
Supply Systems
Flow, resilience, disruption.
Public Systems
Policy, response, governance.

Deploy Zoooo Platform.

Start with one system. Expand to decision infrastructure.
